description: Operations ingest in Postgres schema `ops`: RCON/status polls, per-poll player snapshots, raw Loki log lines. Gameplay parsing output is in schema `game`.

options.content:
### Ops schema (`ops`)
Ingest **before** gameplay parsing:
- **RCON samples** — each HTTP `/api/status` poll (map, bots, `raw_json`).
- **Player snapshots** — one row per player per poll.
- **Log lines** — raw Loki lines for the session window (`line` may be long).

Parsed rows (`game.biobase_cs2_*`) are on the **Game data** dashboard.

panels.description: Time series of RCON / status JSON from bb_cs2_control.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT sampled_at,
       rcon_ok,
       headline,
       humans,
       bots,
       map,
       hostname,
       raw_json,
       session_id
FROM   ops.biobase_cs2_rcon_sample
ORDER BY sampled_at DESC, id DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: RCON / status samples

panels.description: Per-player row from each status poll.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT sampled_at AS status_poll_time,
       player_name,
       steamid,
       userid,
       connected,
       ping,
       loss,
       state,
       session_id
FROM   ops.biobase_cs2_player_snapshot
ORDER BY sampled_at DESC, id DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: Player status (from RCON /status)

panels.description: Raw container log text ingested from Loki for the session window.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ingested_at,
       loki_ts_ns,
       left(line, 2000) AS line_preview,
       session_id,
       id AS log_line_id
FROM   ops.biobase_cs2_log_line
ORDER BY ingested_at DESC, id DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: Raw log lines (preview)

title: Ops ingest (RCON & logs)
